JAX

2025-11-28

Loading packages

library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)
library(MASS)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(DESeq2)
library(viridis)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(pheatmap)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(UpSetR)
library(readxl)
library(ggsci)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(ggprism)
library(ragg)
library(edgeR)
theme_set(theme_classic(base_size = 15))

personal_path = "/fh/working/sun_w/sshen/MorPhiC"
path = "/fh/fast/sun_w/MorPhiC/data/MorPhiC_exchange_experiment/"
dat_path = file.path(path, "DRACC-processed/JAX_exchange_experiment_DRACC_processed_August2025/Tables")

Read in meta data

meta = fread(file.path(personal_path, "JAX_meta_data.tsv"), data.table = FALSE)
dim(meta)
## [1] 62 27
meta[1:2, ]
##   library_preparation.label        label
## 1            S21_GT25-02972 JAX_C01_Rep2
## 2            S22_GT25-02976 JAX_E04_Rep3
##                                                                                                                                   description
## 1 KOLF2.2J derived knockout cell line, GCM1 KO from JAX, differentiated to the trophoblast lineage and favoring primitive syncytium formation
## 2 KOLF2.2J derived knockout cell line, GCM1 KO from JAX, differentiated to the trophoblast lineage and favoring primitive syncytium formation
##    clonal.label               differentiated_product_protocol_id model_system
## 1 MOK20022W-C01 dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7mwekgwz/v1 JAX_C01_Rep2
## 2 MOK20022W-E04 dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q26g7mwekgwz/v1 JAX_E04_Rep3
##   timepoint_value timepoint_unit final_timepoint treatment_condition
## 1               6           days             yes      Not applicable
## 2               6           days             yes      Not applicable
##   wt_control_status ko_strategy ko_gene library_preparation.description
## 1                KO      KO_JAX    GCM1                              NA
## 2                KO      KO_JAX    GCM1                              NA
##   library_preparation.library_preparation_protocol_id
## 1    dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.3byl4z39ovo5/v1
## 2    dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.3byl4z39ovo5/v1
##   library_preparation.average_fragment_size
## 1                                       469
## 2                                       465
##   library_preparation.input_amount_value library_preparation.input_amount_unit
## 1                                    100                                    ng
## 2                                    100                                    ng
##   library_preparation.concentration_value
## 1                                    7.28
## 2                                    7.44
##   library_preparation.concentration_unit library_preparation.total_yield_value
## 1                                  ng/uL                                 145.6
## 2                                  ng/uL                                 148.8
##   library_preparation.total_yield_unit library_preparation.cdna_pcr_cycles
## 1                                   ng                                   0
## 2                                   ng                                   0
##   library_preparation.pcr_cycles_for_indexing
## 1                                          12
## 2                                          12
##                                                       file_id
## 1 JAX_C01_Rep2_GT25-02972_TGACTGACNNNNNNNNN-CAGAACTG_S21_L002
## 2 JAX_E04_Rep3_GT25-02976_TTCCTGTGNNNNNNNNN-CTCCTGAA_S22_L002
##                     run_id         model_organ
## 1 20250616_GT25-RobsonP-99 primitive syncytium
## 2 20250616_GT25-RobsonP-99 primitive syncytium
names(meta)
##  [1] "library_preparation.label"                          
##  [2] "label"                                              
##  [3] "description"                                        
##  [4] "clonal.label"                                       
##  [5] "differentiated_product_protocol_id"                 
##  [6] "model_system"                                       
##  [7] "timepoint_value"                                    
##  [8] "timepoint_unit"                                     
##  [9] "final_timepoint"                                    
## [10] "treatment_condition"                                
## [11] "wt_control_status"                                  
## [12] "ko_strategy"                                        
## [13] "ko_gene"                                            
## [14] "library_preparation.description"                    
## [15] "library_preparation.library_preparation_protocol_id"
## [16] "library_preparation.average_fragment_size"          
## [17] "library_preparation.input_amount_value"             
## [18] "library_preparation.input_amount_unit"              
## [19] "library_preparation.concentration_value"            
## [20] "library_preparation.concentration_unit"             
## [21] "library_preparation.total_yield_value"              
## [22] "library_preparation.total_yield_unit"               
## [23] "library_preparation.cdna_pcr_cycles"                
## [24] "library_preparation.pcr_cycles_for_indexing"        
## [25] "file_id"                                            
## [26] "run_id"                                             
## [27] "model_organ"
names(meta)[apply(meta, 2, \(x) any(is.na(x)))]
## [1] "library_preparation.description"
table(meta$clonal.label)
## 
##       GCM1-KO_MSK-C1       GCM1-KO_MSK-C2  GCM1-KO_NW_DMSO_C20 
##                    3                    3                    3 
##  GCM1-KO_NW_DMSO_C43   GCM1-KO_NW_IAA_C20   GCM1-KO_NW_IAA_C43 
##                    3                    3                    3 
## GCM1-KO_UCSF_DMSO_P1 GCM1-KO_UCSF_DMSO_P2  GCM1-KO_UCSF_DOX_P1 
##                    3                    3                    3 
##  GCM1-KO_UCSF_DOX_P2        MOK20022W-C01        MOK20022W-E04 
##                    3                    3                    3 
##     Parental_NW_DMSO      Parental_NW_IAA   Parental_UCSF_DMSO 
##                    3                    3                    3 
##    Parental_UCSF_DOX           WT_JAX_MSK           WT_NW_DMSO 
##                    3                    3                    2 
##            WT_NW_IAA         WT_UCSF_DMSO          WT_UCSF_DOX 
##                    3                    3                    3
table(table(meta$clonal.label))
## 
##  2  3 
##  1 20
table(table(meta$label))
## 
##  1 
## 62
meta$timepoint = as.factor(meta$timepoint_value)
meta$model_condition = stringr::str_sub(meta$model_system, start = 1, end = -2)

Read in gene count data

cts = fread(file.path(dat_path, "genesCounts.csv"), data.table = FALSE)
dim(cts)
## [1] 36601    63
cts[1:2, c(1:2, (ncol(cts) - 1) : ncol(cts))]
##              Name
## 1 ENSG00000268674
## 2 ENSG00000271254
##   NW_Parent_IAA_Rep3_GT25-02994_GTTAAGGCNNNNNNNNN-ACCTTCGA_S44_L002
## 1                                                                 0
## 2                                                               932
##   NW_C20_IAA_Rep3_GT25-02988_CCGGAATTNNNNNNNNN-ACCGAATG_S28_L002
## 1                                                              0
## 2                                                           1101
##   NW_WT_IAA_Rep2_GT25-02996_TAACGAGGNNNNNNNNN-TAGTCTCG_S78_L003
## 1                                                             0
## 2                                                           866
# Align counts with meta data
stopifnot(
  setequal(meta$file_id, names(cts)[-1]),
  !any(duplicated(meta$file_id)),
  !any(duplicated(names(cts)[-1]))
)
meta = meta[match(names(cts)[-1], meta$file_id), ]
# To matrix
cts_dat = data.matrix(cts[, -1])
rownames(cts_dat) = cts$Name

Exclude genes without annotation

# Read in gene annotation
gene_anno = fread("/fh/fast/sun_w/sshen/MorPhiC/gencode_v44_primary_assembly_info.tsv")
dim(gene_anno)
## [1] 62754     8
cts = cts[cts$Name %in% gene_anno$ensembl_gene_id, ]
cts_dat = cts_dat[rownames(cts_dat) %in% gene_anno$ensembl_gene_id, ]

Discard genes whose expression is 0 in more than 75% of samples

gene_info = data.frame(
  apply(cts_dat, 1, min), 
  apply(cts_dat, 1, median), 
  apply(cts_dat, 1, \(x) quantile(x, probs = 0.75)), 
  apply(cts_dat, 1, max)
)
gene_info[1:2, ]
##                 apply.cts_dat..1..min. apply.cts_dat..1..median.
## ENSG00000268674                      0                         0
## ENSG00000271254                    660                       922
##                 apply.cts_dat..1..function.x..quantile.x..probs...0.75..
## ENSG00000268674                                                      0.0
## ENSG00000271254                                                   1102.5
##                 apply.cts_dat..1..max.
## ENSG00000268674                      2
## ENSG00000271254                   1496
names(gene_info) = c("min", "median", "q75", "max")
summary(gene_info)
##       min               median            q75                 max        
##  Min.   :     0.0   Min.   :     0   Min.   :     0.00   Min.   :     0  
##  1st Qu.:     0.0   1st Qu.:     0   1st Qu.:     0.00   1st Qu.:     1  
##  Median :     0.0   Median :     1   Median :     2.75   Median :     8  
##  Mean   :   433.9   Mean   :   776   Mean   :   980.47   Mean   :  1386  
##  3rd Qu.:   120.0   3rd Qu.:   262   3rd Qu.:   376.75   3rd Qu.:   609  
##  Max.   :258982.0   Max.   :385113   Max.   :431771.75   Max.   :614230
table(gene_info$q75 > 0)
## 
## FALSE  TRUE 
## 14512 21878
# Subset genes
w2kp = which(gene_info$q75 > 0)
cts_dat = cts_dat[w2kp, ]
gene_info = gene_info[w2kp, ]

Check read depth vs. gene expression quantile

meta$read_depth = colSums(cts_dat)/1e6
meta$q75 = apply(cts_dat, 2, quantile, probs = 0.75)
meta$ko_strategy_clean <- gsub("CTRL_", "", meta$ko_strategy, ignore.case = TRUE)
my_colors <- c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A", "#984EA3", "#FF7F00", 
               "#FFFF33", "#A65628", "#F781BF", "#999999", "#66C2A5", "#301934")
names(my_colors) = unique(meta$ko_strategy_clean)
meta$run_id_short = meta$run_id

PCA for all samples

# PCA of all samples
q75 = apply(cts_dat, 1, quantile, probs=0.75)
cts_dat_n = t(cts_dat[q75 > 0,])
cts_dat_n = log(median(meta$q75)*cts_dat_n/meta$q75 + 1)
dim(cts_dat_n)
## [1]    62 21878
sample_pca = prcomp(cts_dat_n, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
names(sample_pca)
## [1] "sdev"     "rotation" "center"   "scale"    "x"
pc_scores = sample_pca$x
eigen_vals = sample_pca$sdev^2
eigen_vals[1:5]/sum(eigen_vals)
## [1] 0.35843286 0.12334859 0.08853181 0.03293028 0.02707007
pvs = round(eigen_vals[1:5]/sum(eigen_vals)*100,1)
pvs
## [1] 35.8 12.3  8.9  3.3  2.7
PC_df = data.frame(pc_scores)
PC_df = cbind(PC_df, meta)

# Note: if you want the plot to USE the new column, change `color=ko_strategy` 
# to `color=ko_strategy_clean` below. Ensure `my_colors` is updated to match the new names!
gPC = ggplot(PC_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, shape=ko_gene, color=ko_strategy_clean)) +
  geom_point(size=2.5, alpha=0.7) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors) +
  
  # Replace scale_shape_prism() with explicit manual shapes
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("GCM1" = 10, "WT" = 15)) + 
  
  labs(color="KO type", shape ="KO gene") + 
  xlab(sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%% variance)", pvs[1])) + 
  ylab(sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%% variance)", pvs[2])) + 
  ggtitle("All samples") + 
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(title = NULL, order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(title = NULL, order = 2)
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0), 
    legend.box.just = "left", 
    legend.direction = "vertical" 
  )

print(gPC)

width_px  = 1920
height_px = round(width_px * (3/4)) 

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(personal_path, paste0("/publication/", "JAX_PCPlot_all_samples.png",sep='')),
  plot     = gPC,
  device   = ragg::agg_png,     # AGG backend, full alpha support
  bg       = "transparent",
  width    = width_px,
  height   = height_px,
  units    = "px",
  dpi      = 300,
)

PCA for samples we are using

meta$ko_strategy_clean <- gsub("CTRL_", "", meta$ko_strategy, ignore.case = TRUE)
model1 = c("UCSF_Pool1_DMSO_Rep", "UCSF_Pool2_DMSO_Rep", "UCSF_Pool1_DOX_Rep", "UCSF_Pool2_DOX_Rep",
           "NW_C20_DMSO_Rep", "NW_C43_DMSO_Rep", "NW_C20_IAA_Rep", "NW_C43_IAA_Rep",
           "JAX_C01_Rep", "JAX_E04_Rep", "MSK_Clone1_Rep", "MSK_Clone2_Rep", "JAX_MSK_WT", 'NW_Parent_IAA_Rep', 'NW_Parent_DMSO_Rep')
sample2kp = which(meta$model_condition %in% model1)

cts_dat_m = cts_dat[,sample2kp]
meta_m    = meta[sample2kp,]

q75 = apply(cts_dat_m, 1, quantile, probs=0.75)
cts_dat_m_UCSF_NW = t(cts_dat_m[q75 > 0,])
cts_dat_m_UCSF_NW = log(median(meta_m$q75)*cts_dat_m_UCSF_NW/meta_m$q75 + 1)
dim(cts_dat_m_UCSF_NW)
## [1]    45 21681
meta_m$clone = stringr::str_split_fixed(meta_m$model_condition, "_", 4)[, 2]
meta_m$clone[meta_m$clone == "MSK"] = "WT"

sample_pca = prcomp(cts_dat_m_UCSF_NW, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
names(sample_pca)
## [1] "sdev"     "rotation" "center"   "scale"    "x"
pc_scores = sample_pca$x
eigen_vals = sample_pca$sdev^2
eigen_vals[1:5]/sum(eigen_vals)
## [1] 0.35815363 0.14525755 0.07760765 0.04105148 0.03558135
pvs = round(eigen_vals[1:5]/sum(eigen_vals)*100,1)
pvs
## [1] 35.8 14.5  7.8  4.1  3.6
PC_df = data.frame(pc_scores)
PC_df = cbind(PC_df, meta_m)

gPC = ggplot(PC_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, shape=ko_gene, color=ko_strategy_clean)) +
  geom_point(size=2.5, alpha=0.7) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors) +
  
  # Replace scale_shape_prism() with explicit manual shapes
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("GCM1" = 10, "WT" = 15)) + 
  
  labs(color="KO type", shape ="KO gene") + 
  xlab(sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%% variance)", pvs[1])) + 
  ylab(sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%% variance)", pvs[2])) + 
  ggtitle("Selected samples") + 
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(title = NULL, order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(title = NULL, order = 2)
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0), 
    legend.box.just = "left", 
    legend.direction = "vertical" 
  )

print(gPC)

width_px  = 1920
height_px = round(width_px * (3/4)) 

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(personal_path, paste0("/publication/", "JAX_PCPlot_selected_samples.png",sep='')),
  plot     = gPC,
  device   = ragg::agg_png,     # AGG backend, full alpha support
  bg       = "transparent",
  width    = width_px,
  height   = height_px,
  units    = "px",
  dpi      = 300,
)

PC_df$model_condition = gsub("_Rep", "", PC_df$model_condition)
gPC = ggplot(PC_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, shape=ko_gene, color=model_condition)) +
  geom_point(size=2.5, alpha=0.7) + 
  # Replace scale_shape_prism() with explicit manual shapes
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("GCM1" = 10, "WT" = 15)) + 
  
  labs(color="KO type", shape ="KO gene") + 
  xlab(sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%% variance)", pvs[1])) + 
  ylab(sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%% variance)", pvs[2])) + 
  ggtitle("Selected samples") + 
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(title = NULL, order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(title = NULL, order = 2)
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0), 
    legend.box.just = "left", 
    legend.direction = "vertical" 
  )

print(gPC)

width_px  = 1920
height_px = round(width_px * (3/4)) 

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(personal_path, paste0("/publication/", "JAX_PCPlot_selected_samples_detailed.png",sep='')),
  plot     = gPC,
  device   = ragg::agg_png,     # AGG backend, full alpha support
  bg       = "transparent",
  width    = width_px,
  height   = height_px,
  units    = "px",
  dpi      = 300,
)

DE analysis for NW

meta$model_condition = stringr::str_sub(meta$model_system, start = 1, end = -2)

df_size = NULL
model1 = c("UCSF_Pool1_DMSO_Rep", "UCSF_Pool2_DMSO_Rep", "UCSF_Pool1_DOX_Rep", "UCSF_Pool2_DOX_Rep",
           "NW_C20_DMSO_Rep", "NW_C43_DMSO_Rep", "NW_C20_IAA_Rep", "NW_C43_IAA_Rep", "NW_Parent_IAA_Rep", 'NW_Parent_DMSO_Rep')
sample2kp = which(meta$model_condition %in% model1)

cts_dat_m = cts_dat[,sample2kp]
meta_m    = meta[sample2kp,]

table(meta_m$ko_strategy)
## 
##            AID_NW      CRISPRi_UCSF     CTRL_AID_DMSO   CTRL_AID_OsTIR1 
##                 6                 6                 6                 6 
## CTRL_CRISPRi_DMSO 
##                 6
stopifnot(all(meta_m$file_id == colnames(cts_dat_m)))
  
## Generate sample information matrix
cols2kp = c("model_condition", "ko_strategy", "ko_gene", 
            "run_id", "run_id_short", "timepoint", "q75")
sample_info = meta_m[,cols2kp]
colnames(sample_info)[which(colnames(sample_info)=="timepoint")] = "day"

dim(sample_info)
## [1] 30  7
sample_info[1:2,]
##       model_condition     ko_strategy ko_gene                   run_id
## 24  NW_Parent_IAA_Rep CTRL_AID_OsTIR1      WT 20250616_GT25-RobsonP-99
## 58 NW_Parent_DMSO_Rep CTRL_AID_OsTIR1      WT 20250616_GT25-RobsonP-99
##                run_id_short day    q75
## 24 20250616_GT25-RobsonP-99   6 975.75
## 58 20250616_GT25-RobsonP-99   6 833.00
# do two steps of filtering
# first, filter based on q75 of each gene
# second, filter based on whether each gene is expressed in at least 75% of the samples

dg_q75 = apply(cts_dat_m, 1, quantile, probs=0.75)
cts_dat_m = cts_dat_m[dg_q75 > 0, ]

print(sprintf("After filtering by gene expression q75, the number of genes reduces from %d to %d", 
              length(dg_q75), nrow(cts_dat_m)))
## [1] "After filtering by gene expression q75, the number of genes reduces from 21878 to 21617"
# update the q75 based on only genes that will be used in the DE analysis
sample_info$q75 = apply(cts_dat_m, 2, quantile, probs = 0.75)
sample_info$log_q75 = log(sample_info$q75)




model1 = c("NW_C20_DMSO_Rep", "NW_C43_DMSO_Rep", "NW_C20_IAA_Rep", "NW_C43_IAA_Rep")
sample2kp = which(meta_m$model_condition %in% model1)
cts_dat_m_NW = cts_dat_m[,sample2kp]
sample_info_NW = sample_info[sample2kp,]
sample_info_NW$clone = stringr::str_split_fixed(sample_info_NW$model_condition, "_", 4)[, 2]


# ---- inputs ----
counts  <- cts_dat_m_NW
colData <- sample_info_NW
rownames(colData) = colnames(counts)
stopifnot(all(colnames(counts) == rownames(colData)))

# ---- group factor: WT vs KO ----
group <- ifelse(colData$ko_gene == "WT",
                "WT", "KO")
group <- factor(group, levels = c("WT","KO"))

design2 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group)
colnames(design2) <- c("WT","KO")

# ---- block vector: KO keep clone IDs; WT each unique ----
block <- as.character(colData$clone)
block = paste(block, group, sep = "_")

# ---- normalization + voom (quality weights optional) ----
y2 <- DGEList(counts)
y2 <- calcNormFactors(y2)
v2 <- voom(y2, design2, plot = FALSE)

# ---- estimate correlation & fit ----
corfit2 <- duplicateCorrelation(v2, design2, block = block)
message(sprintf("Estimated intra-clone correlation: %.3f", corfit2$consensus))

fitNW <- lmFit(v2, design2, block = block, correlation = corfit2$consensus)

# ---- KO vs WT contrast ----
L2 <- makeContrasts(KOvsWT = KO - WT, levels = design2)
fitNW1 <- eBayes(contrasts.fit(fitNW, L2))
ttNW1   <- topTable(fitNW1, coef = "KOvsWT", number = Inf)



model1 = c("NW_C20_DMSO_Rep", "NW_C43_DMSO_Rep", "NW_C20_IAA_Rep", "NW_C43_IAA_Rep", 'NW_Parent_IAA_Rep', 'NW_Parent_DMSO_Rep')
sample2kp = which(meta_m$model_condition %in% model1)
cts_dat_m_NW = cts_dat_m[,sample2kp]
sample_info_NW = sample_info[sample2kp,]
sample_info_NW$clone = stringr::str_split_fixed(sample_info_NW$model_condition, "_", 4)[, 2]


# ---- inputs ----
counts  <- cts_dat_m_NW
colData <- sample_info_NW
rownames(colData) = colnames(counts)
stopifnot(all(colnames(counts) == rownames(colData)))

# ---- group factor: WT vs KO ----
group <- ifelse(colData$ko_gene == "WT",
                "WT", "KO")
group <- factor(group, levels = c("WT","KO"))

design2 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group)
colnames(design2) <- c("WT","KO")

# ---- block vector: KO keep clone IDs; WT each unique ----
block <- as.character(colData$clone)
block = paste(block, group, sep = "_")

# ---- normalization + voom (quality weights optional) ----
y2 <- DGEList(counts)
y2 <- calcNormFactors(y2)
v2 <- voom(y2, design2, plot = FALSE)

# ---- estimate correlation & fit ----
corfit2 <- duplicateCorrelation(v2, design2, block = block)
message(sprintf("Estimated intra-clone correlation: %.3f", corfit2$consensus))

fitNW <- lmFit(v2, design2, block = block, correlation = corfit2$consensus)

# ---- KO vs WT contrast ----
L2 <- makeContrasts(KOvsWT = KO - WT, levels = design2)
fitNW2 <- eBayes(contrasts.fit(fitNW, L2))
ttNW2   <- topTable(fitNW2, coef = "KOvsWT", number = Inf)





model1 = c("NW_C20_IAA_Rep", "NW_C43_IAA_Rep", 'NW_Parent_IAA_Rep', 'NW_Parent_DMSO_Rep')
sample2kp = which(meta_m$model_condition %in% model1)
cts_dat_m_NW = cts_dat_m[,sample2kp]
sample_info_NW = sample_info[sample2kp,]
sample_info_NW$clone = stringr::str_split_fixed(sample_info_NW$model_condition, "_", 4)[, 2]


# ---- inputs ----
counts  <- cts_dat_m_NW
colData <- sample_info_NW
rownames(colData) = colnames(counts)
stopifnot(all(colnames(counts) == rownames(colData)))

# ---- group factor: WT vs KO ----
group <- ifelse(colData$ko_gene == "WT",
                "WT", "KO")
group <- factor(group, levels = c("WT","KO"))

design2 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group)
colnames(design2) <- c("WT","KO")

# ---- block vector: KO keep clone IDs; WT each unique ----
block <- as.character(colData$clone)
block = paste(block, group, sep = "_")

# ---- normalization + voom (quality weights optional) ----
y2 <- DGEList(counts)
y2 <- calcNormFactors(y2)
v2 <- voom(y2, design2, plot = FALSE)

# ---- estimate correlation & fit ----
corfit2 <- duplicateCorrelation(v2, design2, block = block)
message(sprintf("Estimated intra-clone correlation: %.3f", corfit2$consensus))

fitNW <- lmFit(v2, design2, block = block, correlation = corfit2$consensus)

# ---- KO vs WT contrast ----
L2 <- makeContrasts(KOvsWT = KO - WT, levels = design2)
fitNW3 <- eBayes(contrasts.fit(fitNW, L2))
ttNW3   <- topTable(fitNW3, coef = "KOvsWT", number = Inf)
ttNW1$threshold <- ttNW1$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(ttNW1$logFC) > 1
ttNW2$threshold <- ttNW2$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(ttNW2$logFC) > 1
ttNW3$threshold <- ttNW3$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(ttNW3$logFC) > 1
ttNW1Sig = ttNW1[ttNW1$threshold, ]
ttNW2Sig = ttNW2[ttNW2$threshold, ]
ttNW3Sig = ttNW2[ttNW3$threshold, ]

print("Number of overlaps between NW with only DMSO and NW with DMSO + parents")
## [1] "Number of overlaps between NW with only DMSO and NW with DMSO + parents"
length(intersect(rownames(ttNW1Sig), rownames(ttNW2Sig)))
## [1] 1548
print("Number of sig. genes for NW with only DMSO")
## [1] "Number of sig. genes for NW with only DMSO"
nrow(ttNW1Sig)
## [1] 2004
print("Number of sig. genes for NW with DMSO + parents")
## [1] "Number of sig. genes for NW with DMSO + parents"
nrow(ttNW2Sig)
## [1] 1968
print("Number of overlaps between NW with only DMSO and NW with parents")
## [1] "Number of overlaps between NW with only DMSO and NW with parents"
length(intersect(rownames(ttNW1Sig), rownames(ttNW3Sig)))
## [1] 727
print("Number of sig. genes for NW with only DMSO")
## [1] "Number of sig. genes for NW with only DMSO"
nrow(ttNW1Sig)
## [1] 2004
print("Number of sig. genes for NW with parents")
## [1] "Number of sig. genes for NW with parents"
nrow(ttNW3Sig)
## [1] 3382

Volcano plot visualization

# Add a significance column for coloring
ttNW3$threshold <- ttNW3$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(ttNW3$logFC) > 1

p2 = ggplot(ttNW3, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = threshold), alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey70", "TRUE" = "red")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot: KO IAA vs Parents for NW",
       x = "log2 Fold Change",
       y = "-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "black")

width_px  = 1920
height_px = round(width_px * (3/4)) 

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(personal_path, paste0("/publication/", "VolcanoPlot_NW_withParents.png",sep='')),
  plot     = p2,
  device   = ragg::agg_png,     # AGG backend, full alpha support
  bg       = "transparent",
  width    = width_px,
  height   = height_px,
  units    = "px",       
  dpi      = 300,
)
ttNW1 = ttNW1[match(rownames(ttNW3), rownames(ttNW1)), ]
ttNW1$logFC.parent = ttNW3$logFC

p1 = ggplot(ttNW1, aes(logFC, logFC.parent)) +
    geom_pointdensity() +
    ggtitle(sprintf("Scatter of logFC: %s vs %s", "DMSO", "Parent")) +
    xlab("DMSO") + ylab("Parent") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(personal_path, paste0("/publication/", "JAX_logFC_NW_DMSOvsParent.png",sep='')),
  plot     = p1,
  device   = ragg::agg_png,     # AGG backend, full alpha support
  bg       = "transparent",
  width    = width_px,
  height   = height_px,
  units    = "px",
  dpi      = 300,
)
## geom_pointdensity() using method='kde2d' due to large number of points (>20k). You may override this by setting method='neighbors'.
ttNW1 = ttNW1[match(rownames(ttNW3), rownames(ttNW1)), ]
ttNW1$adj.P.Val.parent = ttNW3$adj.P.Val

p1 = ggplot(ttNW1, aes(-log10(adj.P.Val), -log10(adj.P.Val.parent))) +
    geom_pointdensity() +
    ggtitle(sprintf("-log10 adjusted p-values: %s vs %s", "DMSO", "Parent")) +
    xlab("DMSO") + ylab("Parent") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "red", linetype = "dashed")

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(personal_path, paste0("/publication/", "JAX_pval_NW_DMSOvsParent.png",sep='')),
  plot     = p1,
  device   = ragg::agg_png,     # AGG backend, full alpha support
  bg       = "transparent",
  width    = width_px,
  height   = height_px,
  units    = "px",
  dpi      = 300,
)
## geom_pointdensity() using method='kde2d' due to large number of points (>20k). You may override this by setting method='neighbors'.
